subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou at Whose Name the ocean of knowledge surgeth in the realm of possibility, and the fragrance of Whose Revelation hath been diffused amidst the concourse of religions! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک ماج بحر العرفان فی الامکان و هاح عرف ظهورک بین ملاء الادیان اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
